description: Fragment of a 16th-century letter from David Badūssī in Būlāq, who was a teacher in Jerusalem, to Abraham סורג, philanthropist in Egypt, seeking financial assistance. This is followed by another letter, apparently to אברהם סירג'נו in Safed. (Information from CUDL.) See FGP for further information.
description_he: מכתב בעברית מ-Būlāq ל-Safed. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
